target.title: fix(gateway): quarantine malformed MCP loopback schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Quarantine malformed MCP loopback tool schemas before exposing them through `tools/list`.
- Keep healthy sibling tools visible when one loopback tool has unreadable metadata or malformed parameter entries.
- Reject `tools/call` for tools omitted from the advertised loopback schema so a hidden malformed tool cannot still execute.

## Verification

- Rebased branch onto current `origin/main`; pushed head `4cec1696c2c411c65912b7f3b8e68ba0521d9685`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`: passed, 22 tests.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/gateway/mcp-http.schema.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.handlers.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.schema.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.handlers.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`: selected only `core` and `coreTests` for the three gateway files.
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`: selected only `core` and `coreTests` for the three gateway files.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Previous AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` attempt selected `core` and `coreTests`; early guards and `typecheck core` passed, then failed in unrelated current-main ACP test typing. Run: `run_d5c7fb50c149`, lease `cbx_15eae3a90939` / `brisk-shrimp`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a malformed loopback tool schema no longer poisons the whole MCP loopback schema projection or remains callable after being omitted.

Real environment tested: local linked gwt worktree for focused gateway behavior; AWS Crabbox changed-gate attempt for the broad `core`/`coreTests` lane boundary.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`; `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/gateway/mcp-http.schema.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.handlers.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.schema.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.handlers.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`; `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`.

Evidence after fix: targeted gateway tests cover unreadable tool metadata, malformed union property entries, healthy sibling preservation, and refusal to call omitted malformed tools.

Observed result after fix: focused tests, formatting, lint, diff check, lane dry-run, and autoreview passed after the latest rebase/push.

What was not tested: a clean full `pnpm check:changed` after the unrelated ACP type failure is fixed on `origin/main`. Existing PR #88662 fixes that current-main blocker but is not yet landed.
